form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign by nose Ipswich Cl2-Sw November 20 over 1680m defeating Livalittle with 60kg at $6.50. First up last campaign second last of 7 at Sunshine Coast Cl1-Mdnsw June 8 over 1000m, soft track; 8 len behind Air We Go with 59.5kg at $26. Looks all set for an effective return.

Nicely placed and expected to go well.

form.formComment: At the latest run came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 8 at this track Cg&E Bm78 on March 28 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Bundella with 54kg at $9.50. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at this track Cl4 on March 11 over 1110m, slow going 1.75 len behind Royal Commodore with 55.5kg at $7.50. Not far away last start. Has ability and is a strong top-three hope.

form.formComment: Full-brother to Group 2 winner King Of Sparta. Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 4th of 7 at this track Cl4 on March 11 over 1110m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Royal Commodore with 56kg at $1.90. Second run from a spell held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at this track Cl1 on April 1 over 1110m, slow going 0.5 len behind Climactic carrying 58.5kg at $2.90. Fitter now and making headway. Sure to prove hard to beat.
